title: UiPath Reports First Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results
text: UiPath announced financial results for Q1 FY2026 ended April 30, 2025. Financial Results: Q1 2026 revenue $357 million, representing 6% increase from previous year. ARR achieved $1.693 billion, reflecting 12% increase year over year. EPS of $0.11 against a forecast of $0.10, beating expectations. GAAP operating loss improved significantly to $16 million compared to $49 million loss in same period last year. Non-GAAP operating income $70 million with 20% margin, an improvement of 450 basis points. Key Highlights: Quarter marked by the launch of UiPath's agentic automation platform. UiPath announced the launch of its generative AI-based UiPath Medical Record Summarization agent, powered by Google Cloud Vertex AI and Gemini models. Guidance: For Q2 FY2026, UiPath expects revenue in range of $345 million to $350 million, with ARR in range of $1.715 billion to $1.720 billion as of July 31, 2025. Full-year revenue guidance set at $1.549 billion to $1.554 billion.
